scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.start: npm run db:migrate --prefix server && npm run start --prefix server
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run db:push --prefix server && npx --prefix server playwright install chromium
